'''g'nk''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sky fungus|sky fungus]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g'-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sky fungus|sky fungus]]
|-
! Citation form
| g'nk
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:g'ænikith|g'ænikith]] || [[word:g'ænikij|g'ænikij]] || [[word:g'ænikish|g'ænikish]] || [[word:g'æniki|g'æniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:g'anunukuth|g'anunukuth]] || [[word:g'anunukuj|g'anunukuj]] || [[word:g'anunukush|g'anunukush]] || [[word:g'anunuku|g'anunuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:g'anukuth|g'anukuth]] || [[word:g'anukuj|g'anukuj]] || [[word:g'anukush|g'anukush]] || [[word:g'anuku|g'anuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:g'anufkufth|g'anufkufth]] || [[word:g'anufkufj|g'anufkufj]] || [[word:g'anufkufsh|g'anufkufsh]] || [[word:g'anufkuf|g'anufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:g'æneketh|g'æneketh]] || [[word:g'ænekej|g'ænekej]] || [[word:g'ænekesh|g'ænekesh]] || [[word:g'æneke|g'æneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:g'anonokoth|g'anonokoth]] || [[word:g'anonokoj|g'anonokoj]] || [[word:g'anonokosh|g'anonokosh]] || [[word:g'anonoko|g'anonoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:g'anokoth|g'anokoth]] || [[word:g'anokoj|g'anokoj]] || [[word:g'anokosh|g'anokosh]] || [[word:g'anoko|g'anoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:g'anofkofth|g'anofkofth]] || [[word:g'anofkofj|g'anofkofj]] || [[word:g'anofkofsh|g'anofkofsh]] || [[word:g'anofkof|g'anofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:g'anïfkïfth|g'anïfkïfth]] || [[word:g'anïfkïfj|g'anïfkïfj]] || [[word:g'anïfkïfsh|g'anïfkïfsh]] || [[word:g'anïfkïf|g'anïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:g'anïfnïfkïfth|g'anïfnïfkïfth]] || [[word:g'anïfnïfkïfj|g'anïfnïfkïfj]] || [[word:g'anïfnïfkïfsh|g'anïfnïfkïfsh]] || [[word:g'anïfnïfkïf|g'anïfnïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:g'ænækæth|g'ænækæth]] || [[word:g'ænækæj|g'ænækæj]] || [[word:g'ænækæsh|g'ænækæsh]] || [[word:g'ænækæ|g'ænækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:g'ananakath|g'ananakath]] || [[word:g'ananakaj|g'ananakaj]] || [[word:g'ananakash|g'ananakash]] || [[word:g'ananaka|g'ananaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:g'anakath|g'anakath]] || [[word:g'anakaj|g'anakaj]] || [[word:g'anakash|g'anakash]] || [[word:g'anaka|g'anaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:g'anafkafth|g'anafkafth]] || [[word:g'anafkafj|g'anafkafj]] || [[word:g'anafkafsh|g'anafkafsh]] || [[word:g'anafkaf|g'anafkaf]]
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:g'anakatha|g'anakatha]] || [[word:g'anakaja|g'anakaja]] || [[word:g'anakasha|g'anakasha]] || [[word:g'anakaka|g'anakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:g'anakath|g'anakath]] || [[word:g'anakaj|g'anakaj]] || [[word:g'anakash|g'anakash]] || [[word:g'anaka|g'anaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:g'anakathal|g'anakathal]] || [[word:g'anakajal|g'anakajal]] || [[word:g'anakashal|g'anakashal]] || [[word:g'anakakal|g'anakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:g'anakaathatha|g'anakaathatha]] || [[word:g'anakaajaja|g'anakaajaja]] || [[word:g'anakaashasha|g'anakaashasha]] || [[word:g'anakaaka|g'anakaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:g'anakathan|g'anakathan]] || [[word:g'anakajan|g'anakajan]] || [[word:g'anakashan|g'anakashan]] || [[word:g'anakakan|g'anakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:g'anakathaoro|g'anakathaoro]] || [[word:g'anakajaoro|g'anakajaoro]] || [[word:g'anakashaoro|g'anakashaoro]] || [[word:g'anakakaoro|g'anakakaoro]]
|}

{{wordpage|60977ac}}
